original: Less a hammer and more the dangerous fusion of a high speed rocket and a metallic brick, complete with a pole for vague direction, this chemical-boosted sledge is perfect for beating down your enemies. When the rocket actually activates it has quite the devastating kick, too! When you have a jet powered hammer, everything acts like a nail!
